description_long: A woven basket is filled with numerous oval-shaped bread rolls, each featuring a golden-brown crust and a lighter, cream-colored interior visible at the ends. The bread rolls are arranged in a slightly haphazard pile, giving a sense of abundance. Resting atop the basket is a conical, tan-colored hat reminiscent of a traditional Vietnamese nón lá, partially covering the bread. The basket itself has a textured, woven appearance, suggesting it is made from natural fibers. The bread rolls have a glossy surface, indicating a possible egg wash or glaze. No branding or labeling is visible on the basket, bread, or hat.
description: A woven basket brimming with glossy, golden-brown oval bread rolls, partially covered by a conical tan hat.
description_view_0: The basket of bread is seen from the front, with the conical hat tilted to the left, revealing the glossy tops of the bread rolls.
description_view_1: The basket is viewed from a slight angle, showing more of the bread rolls and the hat lifted higher, exposing the pile within.
description_view_2: The basket is seen from the opposite side, with the conical hat covering more of the bread, but several rolls remain visible.
description_view_3: The basket is mostly obscured by the conical hat, with only a few bread rolls peeking out from underneath.
attribute_crust_pattern: The bread rolls have a smooth, glossy crust with a uniform golden-brown color and no visible scoring or flour dusting. The ends reveal a lighter, cream-colored interior, and the surface appears slightly shiny, likely from an egg wash.
